dct_description_sm: The NZMS1 is a historical 1:63,360 topographical series published by Toitū Te Whenua / Land Information New Zealand. The NZMS1 Topographic map series began in 1948 and ended production in 1977. It was replaced by the NZMS260 series.
dct_creator_sm: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand
dct_publisher_sm: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand
